title: Demon slayer and me [KNY]
description: It's a simple modpack inspired by the anime Demon Slayer where you can use the different breathing styles and blood demon arcs
body:
It's a simple modpack inspired by the anime Demon Slayer where you can use the different breathing styles and blood demon arcs.

Become a Demon slayer or a Demon, the path you take is your choice and become the strongest.

You should try this modpack if you like anime or specifically Demon slayer you will like playing this with yourself or with other's.

Keep in mind i'm not the original creator of any of the mods or others you see I'm jaust a person that put them to together. I'm the only person that worked on this modpack
